title: limniris pinetorum
intro: Limniris pinetorum, also known as the mountain iris, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Iridaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Limniris pinetorum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
